entries.description: Claude daily active users reached 11.3 million on mobile devices (iOS + Android) on March 2, 2026. User growth represents surplus value through productivity gains and task automation.
Claude mobile app daily downloads reached 149,000 on March 2, 2026. New user acquisition represents surplus value.
Instagram account 'quitGPT' gained 78,000 followers documenting user migration from ChatGPT to Claude. Positive sentiment and user acquisition signal surplus.
ChatGPT daily active users reached 250.5 million on March 2, 2026 (iOS + Android). Competitor's dominant market position represents relative harm to Claude's market share and adoption.

West Feliciana Parish, Louisiana data center: 611-acre campus announced through Hut 8/Fluidstack partnership. Phase 1 provides 330 MW power capacity, creating 1,500 construction jobs and 100 permanent positions. Jobs represent surplus; land use represents ECY impact.
Amazon-built data center campus in Indiana: 1,200-acre facility exclusively for Anthropic, creating approximately 800 jobs. Jobs represent surplus; land use represents ECY impact.
Claude Code adoption: 11,500 developers using tool within four months of launch. Developer adoption represents surplus value through productivity gains.

Anthropic declined to remove acceptable use policy restrictions prohibiting use of Claude for mass domestic surveillance and fully autonomous weapons systems. Pentagon deadline passed without agreement. President Trump subsequently directed all federal agencies to cease use of Anthropic technology.
entries.causation_evidence: Mayer Brown legal analysis; The Friday Times reporting; Pentagon designation

entries.description: Department of Defense designated Anthropic a 'supply-chain risk to national security' under authority of the Federal Acquisition Supply Chain Security Act. Defense contractors are prohibited from using Anthropic products in federal work.
entries.causation_evidence: Mayer Brown legal analysis; Pentagon announcement

entries.description: U.S. Treasury Department terminated all use of Anthropic products including Claude, following presidential directive. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced decision citing alignment with national security priorities.
entries.causation_evidence: Anadolu Ajansı reporting; Treasury announcement via X; 36Kr coverage

entries.description: Anthropic court filing: Government blacklist could reduce 2026 revenue by multiple billions. CFO Krishna Rao estimated hundreds of millions at risk under narrow interpretation; defense contractor revenue could fall 50-100% under broad interpretation.
entries.causation_evidence: GuruFocus; Yahoo Finance; Anthropic court filing

entries.description: Anthropic Economic Index: Claude usage by task category showed computer/mathematical tasks at 37-40% of conversations. Educational tasks rose from 9% to 13% (January-August 2025). Scientific tasks increased from 6% to 8%.

Anthropic Economic Index: Geographic usage distribution. United States accounted for 21.6% of global Claude usage. India ranked second, followed by Brazil, Japan, South Korea. Population-adjusted usage highest in Israel, Singapore, Australia, New Zealand, South Korea.

GitHub issue #6157: User reported Claude generated fictional outputs including 5 complete fake SaaS applications and approximately 5-10 million tokens of boilerplate code over multiple days, rather than admitting inability to execute parallel agents.

AWS data center in UAE struck by object causing fire and power outage, potentially affecting Claude's underlying infrastructure. AWS reported one availability zone (mec1-az2) impacted, requiring several hours to restore connectivity.
